zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Berney於大約1295年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親Richard Germain de Berney24歲，母親Alice Deedgefield20歲。他於1321年與Catherine de Bedingfield在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1374年2月23日在英國諾福爾可維其加姆享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維其加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Berney于大约1295年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其时，他的父亲Richard Germain de Berney24岁，母亲Alice Deedgefield20岁。他于1321年与Catherine de Bedingfield在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1374年2月23日在英国諾福爾可維其加姆享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可維其加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Berney was born about 1295, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, his father, Richard Germain de Berney, was 24 and his mother, Alice Deedgefield, was 20. He married Catherine de Bedingfield in 1321, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 February 1374, in Witchingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Witchingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Berney est né environ 1295, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Germain de Berney, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Deedgefield, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Bedingfield en 1321, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 février 1374, à Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Berney um 1295 in Norwich, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Germain de Berney 24 und seine Mutter Alice Deedgefield 20. Er hat 1321 in England Catherine de Bedingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1374 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Witchingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Witchingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Berney è nato il circa 1295 nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Richard Germain de Berney, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Deedgefield, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de Bedingfield nel 1321, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 febbraio 1374, nel Witchingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Witchingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Berneyが約1295年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父Richard Germain de Berneyは24歳，母Alice Deedgefieldは20歳であった。1321年にイギリスでCatherine de Bedingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1374年2月23日にイギリスノーフォルクウィトチンガムで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクウィトチンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Berney(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Germain de Berney(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Deedgefield(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1321년 영국에서 Catherine de Bedingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1374년 2월 23일 영국 노르폴크 윗친그함에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윗친그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Berney nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Germain de Berney, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Deedgefield, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Bedingfield em 1321, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1374, em Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Berney родился около 1295 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Germain de Berney было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Deedgefield, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Bedingfield в 1321 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 февраля 1374 г. в местности вичингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности вичингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Berney nació aproximadamente 1295, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Germain de Berney, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Deedgefield, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Catherine de Bedingfield en 1321, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1374, en Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
